14
            
                {# some code #}
                
                
                    {%
                    
                        set
                    
                    some_var =
                    'some value'
                    # some inline comment
                    %}
                
                
                
                    {{
                    # another inline comment
                    'Lorem Ipsum'
                    |uppercase
                    # final inline comment
                    }}
                
                
                {# Both data-action values will be concatenated #}
                
                
                    {%-
                    
                        set
                    
                    dialog_attrs = {
                    'data-action'
                    :
                    'click->dialog#open'
                    |html_attr_type(
                    'sst'
                    ),
} -%}
